chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. Nos. D – 4003 & 4057 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ C.P. No. D-4003/2025: 1) For orders on office objection 2) For hearing of Misc. No.16773/2025. 3) For hearing of Misc. No.16415/2025. 4) For hearing of Main Case. C.P. No. D-4057/2025: 1) For orders on office objection 2) For hearing of Misc. No.16651/2025. 3) For hearing of Main Case. 08.09.2025. Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Kalwar, Advocate for the Petitioner in C.P. No. D- 4003 of 2025. Ms. Farkhanda Shaheen, Advocate for the Petitioner in C.P. No. D- 4057 of 2025. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Addl. Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Haseeb Jamali, Advocate for Respondents No.4 and 5. ________________ Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that both the petitions have become infructuous, as the impugned contract has been withdrawn by the respondent / The Administrator/Chief Officer, District Council, Thatta. Accordingly, both the petitions, in view of above, are disposed of along with listed applications as withdrawn. Office to place a copy of this order in connected petition. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
